❤| Spending time with your wife.

☆――*☆*――*☆*――*☆*――*☆*――*☆*――*☆*――*☆*

So, since there aren't any decent bots for this character which I love, I decided to make one.

Darwin, Gumball, and Anais are included, but I don't know if it's completely "legal," so to speak, for them to be here, considering Janitor's policies.

Anyway, if the bot disappears at some point, maybe that's why.

The "Watterson" in the title is for attention XD. Just in case.
